---
title: "Meet the Resource Speakers"
---

::: {layout-nrow="2"}
[![Charissa Fay Corazon Borja-Tabora, MD, FPPS, FPIDSP](speakers/img/charissa_tabora.png){width="430"}](speakers/emma.qmd)

[![Regina Pascua Berba, MD, MSc, FPCP, FPSMID](speakers/img/regina_berba.jpg){width="430"}](speakers/georgie.qmd)

[![Sonia B. Sia, MD, FPAFP, FPSP, MPM](speakers/img/sonia_sia.png){width="430"}](speakers/sonia.qmd)

[![Pamela T. Tan, MD](speakers/img/pam_tan.png){width="430"}](speakers/sonia.qmd)

[![June M. Gayeta](speakers/img/june_gayeta.png){width="430"}](speakers/june.qmd)

[![Ferissa B. Ablola-Reparejo, RMicro, MSPH](speakers/img/faye_reparejo.jpg){width="430"}](speakers/faye.qmd)

[![Marietta L. Lagrada, RMT](speakers/img/mayet_Lagrada.jpg){width="430"}](speakers/june.qmd)

[![Polle Krystle V. Macaranas, RMT, DMM, DIH](speakers/img/polle_macaranas.png){width="430"}](speakers/faye.qmd)
:::
